name: llm402.ai
description: 400+ AI models, pay-per-request via Bitcoin Lightning, USDC on Base, Cashu ecash, or prepaid balance. No accounts, no API keys.
author: llm402

fields.label: Payment Mode
fields.description: balance = prepaid token (simplest), cashu = ecash, x402 = USDC on Base, lightning = L402 paid via Cashu melt

fields.label: Balance Token
fields.description: Prepaid balance token from llm402.ai. Simplest option — no wallet needed.

fields.label: Cashu nsec
fields.description: Nostr secret key for Cashu wallet.

fields.label: EVM Private Key
fields.description: Private key for USDC on Base (gasless EIP-3009). Never leaves your machine.

fields.label: Max per-request (sats)
fields.description: Reject any single request costing more than this

fields.label: Session budget (sats)
fields.description: Total spending cap per OpenClaw session (sats rail — L402, Cashu, balance)

fields.label: Session USDC budget (cents)
fields.description: Total USDC cap per session (100 cents = $1). Independent from the sats rail.
